# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong:
  administration:
    listen: "0.0.0.0:8443" # Admin API accessibility
    transport: ssl
    tls:
      certfile: /path/to/certificate.crt
      keyfile: /path/to/key.pem

  data_plan: none

  log:
    access: file:/var/log/kong/access.log errors
    error: file:/var/log/kong/error.log

  nginx:
    worker_processes: auto
    worker_rlimit_nofile: 10000
    daemon off;

  plugins: none

  services:
    - name: main-service
      connect_timeout: 60
      host: your-service-host
      port: your-service-port

  tcp:
    listen: "0.0.0.0:8000" # Client traffic

  databases:
    postgresql:
      host: db-host
      port: db-port
      user: db-user
      password: db-password
      database: kong
